introSection: Star Force Orbiter is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Tom Foolery's Adventure Park in Round Rock, Texas, USA. It opened on November 12, 2020 along with the park.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 3 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders.

fullText:
Star Force Orbiter is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Tom Foolery's Adventure Park in Round Rock, Texas, USA. It opened on November 12, 2020 along with the park.



Single train with 3 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders.
